Title: Dedicated onboarding application object
User_Story: As a platform admin, I want onboarding applications stored in a dedicated object, so that journey state is separate from Cases and Leads.
Acceptance_Criteria: Application has status, product, channel, correlation ID, risk fields; links to Account

Title: Integration logs linked to applications
User_Story: As a compliance officer, I want integration logs linked to applications, so that I can reconstruct decision trails.
Acceptance_Criteria: Log records capture direction, HTTP status, correlation ID, payload

Title: Fin account on core account open
User_Story: As an operations user, I want fin accounts created when core opens an account, so that agents see sort code and account number in CRM.
Acceptance_Criteria: CB_Fin_Account__c created on CB_Account_Opened__e

Title: Customer KYC and IDV status on Account
User_Story: As a KYC analyst, I want customer KYC/IDV status on Account, so that I see holistic customer state.
Acceptance_Criteria: CB_KYC_Status__c, CB_IDV_Status__c, CB_Customer_Status__c, CB_Risk_Rating__c populated by handlers

Title: MuleSoft publishes completion events
User_Story: As MuleSoft, I want to publish completion events to Salesforce, so that application state updates asynchronously.
Acceptance_Criteria: REST ingress POST /cb/v1/events/{eventType} with shared secret; triggers update handlers

Title: Publish onboarding submitted event
User_Story: As Salesforce, I want to publish CB_Onboarding_Submitted__e on application submit, so that orchestration starts without blocking the UI.
Acceptance_Criteria: Event published; queueable or MuleSoft orchestration enqueued

Title: Role-based FLS on compliance fields
User_Story: As a security admin, I want role-based FLS on compliance fields, so that only authorised roles edit risk decisions.
Acceptance_Criteria: FLS on application screening and integration log fields per permission set

Title: Field-level encryption for PII
User_Story: As a security admin, I want field-level encryption on NI number DOB and document references in production.
Acceptance_Criteria: Shield encryption policies applied per data classification

Title: Capture retail personal details
User_Story: As a retail applicant, I want to enter personal details (name email phone DOB address nationality), so that CB can perform IDV and pre-score.
Acceptance_Criteria: Screen flow captures fields; Person Account created

Title: Post-submit outcome messaging
User_Story: As a retail applicant, I want to see what happens after I submit, so that I understand wait times and outcomes.
Acceptance_Criteria: Result screen shows prescore summary, expected outcome, application ID

Title: Mobile Experience Cloud retail onboarding
User_Story: As a retail applicant on Experience Cloud, I want to complete onboarding on mobile without an agent.
Acceptance_Criteria: Responsive Experience Cloud site with OTP login

Title: POA upload on weak bureau match
User_Story: As a retail applicant, I want to upload POA when bureau match is weak.
Acceptance_Criteria: Document upload component; CB_Compliance_Document__c POA type; analyst notification
Notes: POA record created; upload UI not started

Title: Nationality-driven prescore
User_Story: As CB, I want UK nationals pre-scored as Low/Simplified CDD and non-UK as Medium/Standard, so that risk tier drives the journey.
Acceptance_Criteria: CB_PrescoreService sets Risk_Tier__c, CDD_Level__c

Title: IDV pass refer fail branching
User_Story: As CB, I want IDV Pass to continue STP and IDV Refer/Fail to pause or reject.
Acceptance_Criteria: Handlers update status; refer creates CB_KYC_CDD case

Title: Screening hit case creation
User_Story: As CB, I want sanctions/PEP hits to create screening cases without auto-rejecting until reviewed.
Acceptance_Criteria: CB_Screening case; application Under_Review

Title: KYC approve triggers account open
User_Story: As CB, I want KYC Approve to trigger core account opening.
Acceptance_Criteria: CB_Account_Opened__e leads to fin account and application Completed

Title: Onboarding scenario guide panel
User_Story: As a demo presenter, I want a scenario guide on the onboarding tab, so that I can explain personas and outcomes.
Acceptance_Criteria: cbOnboardingGuide with journey, prescore rules, scenario table

Title: Demo persona dropdown in flow
User_Story: As a demo presenter, I want to pick demo personas (PASS SANCTIONS_HIT etc.) without typing codes.
Acceptance_Criteria: Flow dropdown scenarios

Title: Capture company and CRN
User_Story: As an SME applicant, I want to enter company details and CRN, so that CB can verify the business at Companies House.
Acceptance_Criteria: Business Account and application with CRN__c

Title: Capture primary director details
User_Story: As an SME applicant, I want to provide primary director details, so that individual KYC can run after KYB.
Acceptance_Criteria: Director Person Account created; nationality on application

Title: Sole trader LLP partnership entity types
User_Story: As an SME applicant, I want to onboard as sole trader LLP or partnership.
Acceptance_Criteria: Entity type selection and journey variants

Title: Reject dissolved companies
User_Story: As CB, I want dissolved companies rejected before individual checks.
Acceptance_Criteria: Application Rejected, reason COMPANY_DISSOLVED

Title: KYB case on nominee director flag
User_Story: As a KYB analyst, I want a case when nominee director is flagged.
Acceptance_Criteria: Case created; application Under_Review

Title: PSC stored as party relationships
User_Story: As CB, I want PSC data stored as party relationships.
Acceptance_Criteria: CB_Party_Relationship__c on clean CRN

Title: Register partner with due diligence
User_Story: As a partner onboarding manager, I want to register a partner institution with due diligence.
Acceptance_Criteria: CB_Partner_Onboarding flow; CB_Partner_Config__c; DD case

Title: Activate partner and issue API credentials
User_Story: As a partner onboarding manager, I want PASS persona to activate partner and issue API credentials.
Acceptance_Criteria: Config Active; API secret generated

Title: Refer persona keeps partner in onboarding
User_Story: As a partner onboarding manager, I want REFER persona to keep partner in onboarding with open DD case.
Acceptance_Criteria: Config not active; case open

Title: Partner certification and re-certification
User_Story: As CB, I want partner certification and periodic re-certification cases.
Acceptance_Criteria: CB_Partner_Certification record type and workflow

Title: Create draft application via API
User_Story: As a partner system, I want to create a draft onboarding application via API.
Acceptance_Criteria: POST /applications returns application ID

Title: Submit application via API
User_Story: As a partner system, I want to submit an application to start orchestration.
Acceptance_Criteria: POST /applications/{id}/submit publishes submitted event

Title: Poll application status via API
User_Story: As a partner system, I want to poll application status.
Acceptance_Criteria: GET /applications/{id} returns status and correlation ID

Title: IDV session creation for partner UX
User_Story: As a partner system, I want IDV session creation for embedded partner UX.
Acceptance_Criteria: POST /applications/{id}/idv/sessions

Title: API rate limiting and IP allowlisting
User_Story: As CB security, I want API rate limiting and IP allowlisting per partner.
Acceptance_Criteria: MuleSoft policies and partner config

Title: Cases linked to applications
User_Story: As a KYC analyst, I want cases linked to applications and accounts.
Acceptance_Criteria: CB_Onboarding_Application__c on Case

Title: Resolve screening case and resume application
User_Story: As a FinCrime analyst, I want to resolve a screening case and resume the application.
Acceptance_Criteria: CB_Resolve_Onboarding_Case flow; CB_ResolveCaseActions

Title: MLRO queue view with risk tier
User_Story: As an MLRO, I want a queue view of open screening cases with risk tier visible.
Acceptance_Criteria: List views or reports on Case and Application risk

Title: Action Plans for enhanced CDD
User_Story: As a KYC analyst, I want Action Plans for enhanced CDD steps.
Acceptance_Criteria: Salesforce Action Plans on Case

Title: Unified onboarding workbench
User_Story: As an analyst, I want a unified onboarding workbench showing application documents screening and integration log.
Acceptance_Criteria: Lightning app page with related lists and timeline
Notes: Record page exists; workbench not started

Title: MLRO escalation audit trail
User_Story: As an MLRO, I want to record escalation decisions with immutable audit.
Acceptance_Criteria: MLRO decision fields and field history or Shield

Title: Async MuleSoft call on submit
User_Story: As CB, I want Salesforce to call MuleSoft on application submit without blocking the user.
Acceptance_Criteria: Queueable and Named Credential; 202 async pattern

Title: Fallback mock orchestration
User_Story: As CB, I want fallback in-org mock orchestration when MuleSoft is unreachable.
Acceptance_Criteria: CB_MockOrchestrator fallback

Title: Per-environment integration settings
User_Story: As CB, I want integration settings configurable per environment.
Acceptance_Criteria: CB_Integration_Settings__c hierarchy custom setting

Title: Stable event schemas for vendor swap
User_Story: As integration lead, I want stable event schemas so Wave 2 vendor swap does not require Salesforce changes.
Acceptance_Criteria: Event fields documented; versioned payloads in Payload_Json__c

Title: Single onboarding operations app
User_Story: As an internal user, I want one app for onboarding demos and operations.
Acceptance_Criteria: CB_Onboarding Lightning app deployed

Title: All Applications list view
User_Story: As an internal user, I want list views showing all applications not only recently viewed.
Acceptance_Criteria: All_Applications list view

Title: Expire stale applications after 30 days
User_Story: As CB, I want stale applications expired after 30 days.
Acceptance_Criteria: CB_ApplicationExpiryScheduler and batch

Title: Resume saved application within expiry window
User_Story: As a customer, I want to resume a saved application within the expiry window.
Acceptance_Criteria: Save and resume via Experience Cloud or draft status

Title: Email OTP registration
User_Story: As a retail applicant, I want to register with email OTP, so that I can start onboarding without a branch visit.
Acceptance_Criteria: Experience Cloud site; OTP verification; guest to authenticated

Title: Embedded Onfido IDV
User_Story: As a retail applicant, I want embedded Onfido IDV in the journey, so that I complete selfie/document check on my phone.
Acceptance_Criteria: Onfido SDK or redirect; real session status polling

Title: Email SMS status notifications
User_Story: As a retail applicant, I want status updates by email/SMS when my application is referred or completed.
Acceptance_Criteria: Marketing Cloud or Service notifications on status change

Title: Companies House company name search
User_Story: As an SME applicant, I want to search Companies House by company name, so that I don't mistype CRN.
Acceptance_Criteria: Typeahead CH search API

Title: Multiple directors and UBOs
User_Story: As an SME applicant, I want to add multiple directors/UBOs, so that KYB captures full ownership.
Acceptance_Criteria: Multi-party capture UI and CB_Party_Relationship__c

Title: Swap mock for production APIs in MuleSoft only
User_Story: As integration lead, I want to swap mock base URL for production System APIs in MuleSoft only.
Acceptance_Criteria: No Salesforce metadata change for event contracts

Title: Vendor timeouts and circuit breakers
User_Story: As CB, I want vendor timeouts and circuit breakers, so that partial failures don't corrupt application state.
Acceptance_Criteria: MuleSoft retry policies; compensating transactions documented

Title: SLA milestones on onboarding cases
User_Story: As operations manager, I want SLA milestones on onboarding cases.
Acceptance_Criteria: Entitlements and milestones per record type

Title: Integration failure alerting
User_Story: As SRE, I want Datadog/Splunk alerts on integration failure rates.
Acceptance_Criteria: Log streaming from MuleSoft and Salesforce Event Monitoring

Title: Onboarding funnel dashboards
User_Story: As product owner, I want onboarding funnel dashboards.
Acceptance_Criteria: Reports: submitted to completed conversion refer rates TAT

Title: Consent records with lawful basis
User_Story: As DPO, I want consent records with lawful basis per processing purpose.
Acceptance_Criteria: Consent object or CB consent fields on Application

Title: FATF high-risk country EDD
User_Story: As compliance, I want FATF high-risk country list to force Enhanced CDD.
Acceptance_Criteria: Country risk reference data in prescore

Title: Secrets rotation and vault storage
User_Story: As security, I want secrets rotated and not stored in custom fields unencrypted.
Acceptance_Criteria: API secrets in vault; masked in UI

Title: Secure POA upload
User_Story: As a customer, I want to upload POA securely when requested.
Acceptance_Criteria: File upload to encrypted storage; linked to CB_Compliance_Document__c

Title: Analyst document approve reject
User_Story: As a KYC analyst, I want to approve/reject documents with reason codes.
Acceptance_Criteria: Document status workflow

Title: Partner sandbox environment
User_Story: As a partner, I want a sandbox environment with test personas.
Acceptance_Criteria: Separate Named Credential and partner config per env

Title: Partner status webhooks
User_Story: As a partner, I want webhooks for application status changes.
Acceptance_Criteria: MuleSoft Experience API callbacks

Title: Partner certification before prod keys
User_Story: As CB, I want partner certification before production keys.
Acceptance_Criteria: Certification case and checklist

Title: Application to ApplicationForm mapping
User_Story: As enterprise architect, I want a mapping document from CB_Onboarding_Application__c to FSC ApplicationForm.
Acceptance_Criteria: Signed fit-gap and migration strategy

Title: Dual-write migration period
User_Story: As CB, I want dual-write period during migration.
Acceptance_Criteria: Parallel run with reconciliation reports
